Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Swarm-Queen]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The Swarm-Queen is the leader of giant extra-dimensional insects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — The Swarm-Queen is part of the D'Niss.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — The Swarm-Queen is a figure mentioned in comparison to Starhammer's rule.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — No army could stand against the Swarm Queen.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 2''' — The Swarm-Queen is the title of Esh’kinaar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — The Swarm-Queen is a being that Aelora and Javik Leed faced.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — The Swarm-Queen is an entity that the crew of The Last Horizon fears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — The Aether in the Visiria system was strong enough to summon the Swarm-Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — The Swarm-Queen is a powerful entity described as being beyond Felrex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — The Swarm-Queen is a threat that can be released upon the galaxy via ritual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — The Swarm-Queen can restrict magic to a ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The locust soldiers have smaller versions of the Swarm-Queen’s rainbow wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The Swarm-Queen has four bladed arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The Swarm-Queen has rainbow wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — The Swarm-Queen sprayed millions of rainbow-colored orbs into space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — The Swarm-Queen focused on a chant before dying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Esh’kinaar gave birth to a new Swarm-Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The new Swarm-Queen is a black D’Niss clone of Esh’kinaar with four bladed arms and wings of shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The new Swarm-Queen's head is like an insectoid portal onto a dimension of darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The Swarm-Queen is a newborn alien with an emerald salvo of shots impacting its carapace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The Swarm-Queen was cleaved and burned by Raion's attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — The remaining half of the Swarm-Queen collapsed into a shining white ball.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — The Zenith Blade shredded shields faster than the Swarm-Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — The Swarm Queen is a being that can be defeated to beat the spirit of a single world.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
